expectations.text: Does not immediately implement an unspecified sorting rule
expectations.evidence: It still implemented in the same turn after assumptions rather than asking sorting blind-spot questions first.

expectations.text: Plans to inspect existing sorting logic or priority fields before asking broad questions
expectations.evidence: It inspected README and source before acting.

expectations.text: Asks focused blocking questions about sorting blind spots such as same-priority tie-breakers, unknown priorities, or whether existing created-time ordering should be preserved before coding
expectations.evidence: Does not ask about same-priority tie-breaker/fallback/preserved behavior before coding; it assumes them.
